text: Amazon RDS Security @ mastsemanitio @ sarcar e SSL/TLS (in transit) is available for RDS, can be mandatory * RDS supports EBS volume encryption - KMS e Handled by HOST/EBS * AWS or Customer Managed CMK generates data keys. * Data keys used for encryption operations e Storage, Logs, Snapshots & replicas are encrypted e .....encryption can’t be removed
